title_zh: 新加坡高端酒店餐饮空间家具项目
title_en: Singapore Luxury Hotel Dining Space Furniture Project
desc_zh:
该项目位于新加坡一处高端酒店餐饮空间，整体定位为精品酒店餐厅与商务宴请接待空间。空间以深色木饰面、镜面天花、暖色灯光、艺术吊灯、定制餐桌及高质感软装为主要设计语言，强调安静、私密、精致的用餐体验。

【客户核心需求】家具必须符合酒店餐饮空间的高端定位；座椅和卡座需要兼顾舒适度与耐用性；不同区域需要不同家具解决方案；家具落地效果要保持统一。

【我们的解决方案】根据酒店空间风格进行家具深化匹配，以沉稳、高级、耐用为核心。圆桌宴请区以单椅为主；靠墙卡座区采用双向对坐结构；半开放包厢区通过木质隔断、固定卡座、壁灯和餐桌形成完整用餐单元。

【落地效果】圆桌宴会区整体更加稳重正式；卡座区域通过浅色坐垫和深木结构的搭配让空间更有层次；整体实现了酒店设计感、商业耐用性、舒适体验、空间统一性之间的平衡。
desc_en: Singapore boutique hotel restaurant and business dining space. Dark wood paneling, warm lighting and artistic chandeliers create a quiet, refined dining experience. Solution: banquet chairs, booth seating, private room furniture and lounge seating.

title_zh: 纽约高端酒店软包家具项目
title_en: New York Luxury Hotel Upholstered Furniture Project
desc_zh:
该项目位于美国纽约，是一个定位高端的城市酒店项目。酒店整体空间融合了现代奢华、东方艺术感与纽约都市气质，公共区域包含大堂休闲区、酒廊、会客区、泳池休闲区及部分套房空间。

【客户需求】家具风格必须与酒店整体设计统一；产品需要适合酒店高频使用；坐感要舒适但造型不能松垮；细节工艺要经得起近距离观察。

【我们的解决方案】酒廊和会客区域以低重心沙发、休闲椅和组合座椅为主；大堂休闲区强调开放式会客体验；泳池及休闲空间注重轻盈感和舒适度；套房和私密休息区域强调安静、舒适和居住感。

【落地效果】酒廊区域沙发和休闲椅与深色吧台、暖色灯带、壁炉和木饰面形成统一氛围；公共休闲区米灰色、暖棕色软包家具让空间更有层次。
desc_en: New York high-end hotel upholstered furniture project. Modern luxury blended with Eastern artistry. Covers lobby lounge, bar, meeting areas, poolside and suite spaces with premium upholstered seating.

title_zh: 高端咖啡厅家具工程案例
title_en: Custom Furniture for a Contemporary Cafe Space
desc_zh:
本项目为一处现代商业咖啡厅空间，整体定位偏向高端、安静、松弛的城市咖啡体验。空间以大面积落地玻璃、自然采光、浅木色墙面、金属网格吊顶为主要设计语言。

【客户核心需求】家具需要符合咖啡厅整体设计调性，具备设计感，同时保持简洁克制；要适合高频商业使用；不同区域需要不同的家具组合。

【我们的解决方案】临窗区域配置木质靠背餐椅、黑色软包坐垫及圆形小餐桌；吧台区域采用黑色皮面与暖棕木色结合的休闲椅；休闲停留区搭配软包卡座、条纹布艺单椅。

【家具配置亮点】靠窗区小圆桌与轻便餐椅适合高频翻台；卡座区软包长椅提升舒适度；休闲区条纹布艺单椅形成视觉记忆点；整体颜色控制在黑色、暖棕色、浅木色之间。
desc_en: High-end modern cafe furniture project. Floor-to-ceiling glass, warm wood tones define the space. Solution: slim metal-leg dining chairs for window zone, leather leisure chairs for bar zone, booth seating and stripe accent chairs for lounge zone.

title_zh: 德基广场空中花园户外咖啡厅家具项目
title_en: Deji Plaza Sky Garden Cafe Furniture Project
desc_zh:
德基广场作为南京高端商业地标，本项目位于一期七层空中花园休闲区域，以城市绿洲为核心概念，将餐饮、咖啡、休憩、社交体验融合在同一空间中。

【客户需求】家具必须与空中花园的自然氛围融合；需要具备较强的商业耐用性；造型要有设计感；需要适应咖啡外摆区、吧台高脚椅区、公共休闲区等不同功能区域。

【我们的解决方案】材质以暖木色、咖色、米色为主；产品类型涵盖高脚吧椅、咖啡桌椅、休闲椅、公共长椅及定制化座位组合。

【落地效果】暖木色座椅、简洁的咖啡桌、弧形吧台和高脚椅与周围绿植、灯光、建筑曲线形成了统一的视觉关系，让空间同时具备了翻台效率、停留舒适度和品牌调性。
desc_en: Sky garden outdoor cafe furniture at Deji Plaza, Nanjing. Urban oasis concept. Warm wood, cafe brown and beige tones with high bar stools, cafe tables, lounge chairs and public benches integrated with greenery.

title_zh: 伦敦高端西餐厅连锁门店家具项目
title_en: Premium Western Restaurant Chain Furniture Project – London
desc_zh:
该项目为伦敦某高端西餐厅连锁品牌的多门店家具定制工程。客户对各门店视觉风格的高度统一有严格要求，整体以深胡桃木色、皮革黑与暖铜金属为主色调，营造沉稳而不失精致的现代欧式就餐氛围。

【客户核心需求】各门店家具必须保持品牌一致性；座椅需要兼顾正式感与舒适度；吧台区需要有设计感的高脚椅；面料须通过英国商业耐磨及防火标准。

【我们的解决方案】主厅区域选用高背皮革餐椅，深棕色与黑色交替排列，与木纹桌面和铜色桌脚形成统一调性；卡座组合区以固定木框卡座搭配活动餐椅；吧台区定制高脚椅，座面采用皮革软包，脚踏使用抛光铜管；等候休闲区搭配低矮休闲单椅与边几。

【落地效果】全系列产品采用商用级海绵填充，面料通过耐磨及防火测试，满足英国BS7176商业家具使用标准。多门店落地后视觉风格高度统一，品牌辨识度显著提升。
desc_en: Multi-location custom furniture project for a premium Western restaurant chain in London. Deep walnut, leather black and warm brass metal palette. High-back leather dining chairs, wood-frame booth seating, brass-detail bar stools and lounge seating. All pieces meet UK BS7176 commercial furniture standards.

title_zh: 北京川菜馆家具定制项目
desc_zh:
该项目位于北京市核心商圈的一家川菜主题餐厅，面积约280平方米，定位为正宗川菜体验与商务宴请场所。空间设计以深木色、红色点缀与现代中式元素为主，营造热情、传统而不失现代感的用餐氛围。

【客户核心需求】家具必须符合川菜餐厅的文化调性；座椅需兼顾舒适度与高频翻台效率；包厢区需要私密性强的卡座设计；整体耐用性要经受高人流量考验；材质需防油污易清洁。

【我们的解决方案】主厅区域配置实木框架餐椅，深棕色与红色软包坐垫交替排列，与空间主题呼应；靠墙卡座区采用高背软包卡座，红木色框架搭配深色皮革，围合感强且易清洁；包厢区定制固定卡座与活动餐椅组合，软包面料选用防污耐磨商用级材质；散台区配置可快速翻台的轻便餐椅与圆桌组合。

【落地效果】实木餐椅与川菜文化装饰元素形成统一视觉语言；卡座区的红木色框架与墙面装饰线条相呼应；包厢区软包座椅提升了私密用餐体验；所有座椅通过防污面料处理，大幅降低了日常维护成本；整体家具配置在保持文化氛围的同时，满足了高频商业使用的耐久性要求。
desc_en:
Sichuan restaurant furniture project in Beijing's core business district. 280 sqm space blending traditional Sichuan culture with modern design. Deep wood tones, red accents and contemporary Chinese elements.

Solution: solid wood frame dining chairs with red upholstered cushions for main hall; high-back leather booth seating with rosewood frames for wall zones; custom booth-chair combinations for private rooms with stain-resistant commercial-grade fabric; lightweight chairs with round tables for quick-service zones.

Result: wood chairs echoed Sichuan cultural decor; rosewood booth frames matched wall trim; private room upholstery enhanced dining privacy; stain-resistant fabric significantly reduced maintenance costs while preserving cultural atmosphere and meeting high-frequency durability requirements.

title_zh: 广州CHIO起雾·客厅家具项目
title_en: Guangzhou CHIO Cafe & Lounge Furniture Project
desc_zh:
该项目位于广州某高端商业综合体内的CHIO起雾·客厅复合空间，面积约350平方米，定位为咖啡、轻食、社交、办公多功能融合空间。整体设计以浅木色、米白色与暖灰色为主调，强调自然、放松、高效的现代都市生活方式。

【客户核心需求】家具需适应多场景使用（办公、社交、休闲）；座椅要兼顾长时间停留的舒适度；不同功能区需要不同的家具组合；整体风格需与品牌"起雾"的轻松、模糊边界感契合；产品须符合高端商业空间的品质要求。

【我们的解决方案】吧台区配置高脚椅，浅木色与金属腿结合，简洁轻盈；咖啡散座区选用北欧风餐椅搭配小圆桌，适合快速翻台；沙发休闲区配置深度坐感的布艺沙发与单人休闲椅，米白色与暖灰色交织；办公共享区定制长桌搭配人体工学座椅，满足长时间工作需求；部分区域使用模块化座椅，可根据活动需求灵活组合。

【落地效果】浅木色家具与大面积落地玻璃、自然采光形成通透轻盈的空间感；米白色沙发与暖灰色单椅让休闲区更具层次；办公区人体工学椅显著提升了顾客停留时长；模块化座椅的灵活性让空间承办小型活动时游刃有余；整体家具配置成功诠释了"起雾"品牌模糊工作与休闲边界的理念，深受年轻客群喜爱。
desc_en:
CHIO Cafe & Lounge multi-functional space in a premium Guangzhou commercial complex. 350 sqm space integrating coffee, light meals, socializing and co-working. Light wood, off-white and warm grey palette emphasizing natural, relaxed modern urban lifestyle.

Solution: light wood and metal bar stools for counter zone; Nordic-style dining chairs with small round tables for quick-service cafe zone; deep-cushion fabric sofas and lounge chairs in off-white and warm grey for relaxation zone; long tables with ergonomic chairs for co-working zone; modular seating for flexible event configurations.

Result: light wood furniture paired with floor-to-ceiling glass created airy transparency; off-white sofas and grey lounge chairs added visual depth to relaxation zones; ergonomic office chairs significantly increased dwell time; modular seating flexibility enabled small events; overall furniture successfully embodied the brand's concept of blurring work-leisure boundaries, earning strong appeal among young clientele.

title_zh: 杭州川菜馆家具定制项目
desc_zh:
该项目位于杭州市某商业街区的川菜主题餐厅，面积约180平方米，定位为面向本地食客与游客的正宗川菜体验空间。空间设计以深红色、原木色与金属元素为主，营造热烈、传统且具有现代感的用餐氛围。

【客户核心需求】家具需符合川菜餐厅的文化特色；座椅要舒适且耐用，适应高频翻台；预算控制在合理范围内；材质需防油污、易清洁；整体风格需与杭州本地审美结合。

【我们的解决方案】主厅区域配置实木框架餐椅，深棕色软包坐垫，耐用易清洁；靠窗卡座区采用红色皮革软包搭配木质框架，增加视觉记忆点；散台区选用轻便餐椅，方便快速调整座位布局；所有座椅面料经过防污处理，符合川菜高油餐饮场景需求。

【落地效果】实木餐椅与川菜文化装饰相得益彰；红色卡座成为顾客拍照打卡的热门区域；防污面料显著降低了日常清洁难度；整体家具配置在预算范围内实现了文化表达与商业实用性的平衡。
desc_en:
Sichuan restaurant furniture project in Hangzhou commercial district. 180 sqm space targeting local diners and tourists seeking authentic Sichuan cuisine. Deep red, natural wood and metal elements create warm, traditional yet modern dining atmosphere.

Solution: solid wood frame dining chairs with dark brown upholstered cushions, durable and easy to clean; red leather upholstered booth seating with wood frames at window zone for visual appeal; lightweight chairs for flexible seating arrangements; all fabrics treated with stain-resistant coating for high-oil Sichuan cuisine environment.

Result: wood chairs complemented Sichuan cultural decor; red booths became popular photo spots; stain-resistant fabric significantly eased daily cleaning; overall furniture configuration achieved balance between cultural expression and commercial practicality within budget.

title_zh: 陕西汉中市火锅店家具项目
title_en: Hanzhong Shaanxi Hot Pot Restaurant Furniture Project
desc_zh:
该项目位于陕西省汉中市某商业综合体内的火锅主题餐厅，面积约220平方米，定位为面向家庭聚餐与朋友聚会的大众火锅消费场所。空间设计以暖木色、橙红色与工业感元素为主，营造热闹、亲民、舒适的用餐氛围。

【客户核心需求】家具需适应火锅餐饮的高温高湿环境；座椅要防水防污，易于清洁维护；卡座区需满足4-6人家庭聚餐需求；整体造价需控制在连锁火锅店预算范围内；耐用性要经受每日高频使用考验。

【我们的解决方案】主厅散台区配置仿木纹防火板餐桌搭配仿皮餐椅，防水易擦；卡座区采用皮革软包长椅搭配固定桌面，围合感强且便于清洁；所有座椅使用商用级防污皮革，耐高温、防油污；桌面选用耐高温台面材质，抗烫伤、易清洁；椅脚采用加固金属框架，增强承重与稳定性。

【落地效果】仿皮座椅与火锅场景完美适配，油污水渍一擦即净；卡座区成为家庭聚餐的首选区域；耐高温桌面经受住了每日火锅使用的考验；金属框架椅腿显著提升了产品使用寿命；整体家具配置在控制成本的同时，满足了火锅餐饮的特殊使用需求，获得业主持续复购。
desc_en:
Hot pot restaurant furniture project in a Hanzhong, Shaanxi commercial complex. 220 sqm space targeting family dining and social gatherings. Warm wood tones, orange-red accents and industrial elements create lively, approachable and comfortable dining atmosphere.

Solution: wood-effect laminate tables with faux-leather chairs for open seating, waterproof and easy to wipe; leather upholstered booth benches with fixed tabletops for strong enclosure and easy cleaning; all seating uses commercial-grade stain-resistant leather, heat-resistant and oil-proof; tabletops in heat-resistant material, scald-proof and easy to clean; reinforced metal chair frames for enhanced load-bearing and stability.

Result: faux-leather chairs perfectly suited hot pot environment, oil and water stains wiped clean instantly; booth zones became preferred choice for family dining; heat-resistant tabletops withstood daily hot pot use; metal chair frames significantly extended product lifespan; overall furniture configuration met specialized hot pot dining requirements while controlling costs, earning repeat orders from the owner.

title_zh: 东京轻食咖啡厅家具项目
title_en: Tokyo Light Meal Cafe Furniture Project
desc_zh:
该项目位于东京涩谷区某商业街区的轻食咖啡厅，面积约120平方米，定位为面向上班族与年轻消费者的快捷轻食空间。空间设计以原木色、白色与浅绿色为主调，强调自然、清爽、高效的用餐体验。

【客户核心需求】家具需适应快速翻台的运营需求；座椅要轻便易移动，便于清洁；整体风格需符合日式简约美学；产品须通过日本商业家具耐用性测试；预算控制在合理范围内。

【我们的解决方案】临窗吧台区配置原木色高脚椅，座面采用曲木工艺，轻便耐用；散座区选用北欧风餐椅，白色金属腿搭配原木坐面；卡座区使用浅绿色布艺软包搭配原木框架，增加舒适度；所有餐桌采用防水耐磨桌面，易于清洁。

【落地效果】原木色与白色的搭配让空间更加明亮通透；浅绿色卡座成为顾客拍照打卡的热门区域；家具的轻便性大幅提升了运营效率，业主对翻台率提升表示满意。
desc_en:
Light meal cafe furniture project in Tokyo Shibuya district. 120 sqm space targeting office workers and young consumers. Natural wood, white and light green palette emphasizing fresh, efficient dining.

Solution: bentwood high stools in natural oak for window bar zone; Nordic-style dining chairs with white metal legs and wood seats for open seating; light green fabric upholstered booth seating with wood frames; all tabletops waterproof and wear-resistant.

Result: natural wood and white tones brightened the space; light green booths became a popular photo spot; lightweight furniture significantly improved operational efficiency and table turnover.

title_zh: 温哥华海鲜餐厅家具项目
desc_zh:
该项目位于加拿大温哥华滨水区的一家海鲜主题餐厅，面积约280平方米，定位为面向家庭聚餐与朋友聚会的中高端休闲餐厅。空间设计以蓝白色调为主，融入海洋元素与自然木纹，营造轻松愉悦的用餐氛围。

【客户核心需求】家具需呼应海洋主题；座椅要舒适，适合家庭长时间用餐；不同区域需要不同的座位组合；材质须防水防潮，适应滨水环境；产品须通过加拿大商业家具标准。

【我们的解决方案】主厅区域配置蓝白条纹布艺餐椅，搭配原木色餐桌；靠窗卡座区使用深蓝色皮革软包，防水易清洁；儿童友好区配置圆角设计的矮桌椅组合；户外露台区选用防腐木框架搭配防水布艺坐垫的休闲椅。

【落地效果】蓝白条纹餐椅与墙面海洋壁画、吊灯形成统一的主题氛围；卡座区的深蓝色软包与窗外海景相呼应；儿童友好区的圆角设计获得家庭顾客的好评；户外露台家具经受住了温哥华多雨气候的考验。
desc_en:
Seafood restaurant furniture project in Vancouver waterfront area. 280 sqm space targeting family dining and social gatherings. Blue and white palette with ocean elements and natural wood grain.

Solution: blue-and-white striped fabric dining chairs with natural wood tables for main hall; deep blue leather upholstered booth seating for window zone, waterproof and easy to clean; rounded-corner low table-chair sets for family-friendly zone; outdoor patio chairs with rot-resistant wood frames and waterproof fabric cushions.

Result: striped chairs paired with ocean murals and pendant lights created a unified theme; deep blue booth upholstery echoed the waterfront view outside; rounded-corner furniture in the kids zone earned positive family feedback; outdoor furniture withstood Vancouver's rainy climate.

title_zh: 成都火锅店家具定制项目
title_en: Chengdu Hot Pot Restaurant Furniture Project
desc_zh:
本项目为成都市一家火锅主题餐厅的整店家具定制，面积约240平方米，定位为面向本地食客与游客的大众火锅聚餐空间。空间以暖木色、复古红与工业风金属为主，营造热闹、烟火气十足的就餐氛围。

【客户核心需求】家具必须适应火锅高温、高湿、重油的就餐环境；桌面要耐烫防水、易清洁；座椅要防污耐磨、结实稳固；卡座需满足4-6人聚餐围合；整体造价需控制在火锅店合理预算内。

【我们的解决方案】散座区采用可嵌电磁炉的耐高温火锅桌，搭配商用级仿皮餐椅，油污一擦即净；卡座区使用高背仿皮卡座搭配固定桌面，围合感强且便于清洁；椅脚采用加固金属框架，提升承重与稳定性；所有座椅面料做防污防水处理，桌面选用耐高温抗烫台面。

【落地效果】仿皮座椅与火锅场景高度适配，日常清洁效率大幅提升；卡座区成为家庭与朋友聚餐的首选区域；耐高温桌面经受住每日高频火锅使用的考验；加固椅脚显著延长了使用寿命；整体家具在控制成本的同时，满足了火锅餐饮高温重油环境的特殊耐用需求。
desc_en:
Full-store furniture customization for a hot pot restaurant in Chengdu. The 240 sqm space targets local diners and tourists for casual hot pot gatherings, with warm wood tones, retro red and industrial metal creating a lively, bustling dining atmosphere.

Client needs: furniture must withstand the high-heat, high-humidity, heavy-oil hot pot environment; tabletops must be heat- and water-resistant and easy to clean; seating must be stain-resistant, durable and stable; booths must seat 4-6 for group dining; overall cost must stay within a sensible hot pot budget.

Solution: heat-resistant hot pot tables with built-in induction cookers paired with commercial-grade faux-leather chairs for open seating, wiping clean instantly; high-back faux-leather booths with fixed tabletops for strong enclosure and easy cleaning; reinforced metal chair frames for load-bearing and stability; all upholstery treated to be stain- and water-resistant, with scald-proof heat-resistant tabletops.

Result: faux-leather seating suited the hot pot setting perfectly, greatly improving daily cleaning efficiency; booths became the preferred choice for family and friend gatherings; heat-resistant tabletops withstood daily high-frequency hot pot use; reinforced chair frames significantly extended lifespan; the furniture met the special durability demands of a high-heat, heavy-oil hot pot environment while controlling cost.

title_zh: 上海粤菜餐厅家具定制项目
desc_zh:
本项目为上海市一家中高端粤菜餐厅的家具定制，面积约300平方米，定位为精致正餐与商务宴请空间。空间以深木色、米色与黄铜点缀为主，营造沉稳、雅致而不失现代感的就餐氛围。

【客户核心需求】家具需符合中高端粤菜餐厅的品质调性；座椅要兼顾正餐长时停留的舒适与支撑；圆桌宴请区与包厢需要不同的家具组合；面料须耐磨易护理；整体风格要稳重统一。

【我们的解决方案】主厅区域采用实木框架软包餐椅，深木色与米色软包交替，沉稳雅致；圆桌宴请区以高背单椅为主，提升宴请仪式感；靠墙卡座区采用软包高背卡座增强围合；包厢区配置定制固定卡座与活动单椅组合，营造私密商务氛围；所有软包面料做防污易护理处理。

【落地效果】实木软包餐椅与黄铜、深木装饰形成统一雅致的粤菜就餐氛围；圆桌宴请区的高背单椅让宴请更显正式；包厢卡座提升了商务宴请的私密性；耐磨易护理面料大幅降低了日常维护成本；整体家具配置在品质感与商业耐用性之间取得了良好平衡。
desc_en:
Furniture customization for a mid-to-high-end Cantonese restaurant in Shanghai. The 300 sqm space is positioned for refined dining and business banquets, with deep wood tones, beige and brass accents creating a composed, elegant yet modern atmosphere.

Client needs: furniture must match the quality tone of a mid-to-high-end Cantonese restaurant; seating must balance comfort and support for long full-course meals; round-table banquet areas and private rooms need different furniture; fabrics must be wear-resistant and easy to maintain; the overall style must be composed and unified.

Solution: solid-wood-frame upholstered dining chairs alternating deep wood and beige upholstery for the main hall; high-back single chairs for the round-table banquet area to enhance the sense of occasion; upholstered high-back booths along the walls for stronger enclosure; custom fixed booths with movable single chairs for private rooms, creating an intimate business atmosphere; all upholstery treated to be stain-resistant and easy to maintain.

Result: solid-wood upholstered chairs paired with brass and deep-wood decor formed a unified, elegant Cantonese dining atmosphere; high-back chairs made banquets more formal; private-room booths enhanced business-dining privacy; wear-resistant easy-care fabrics greatly reduced maintenance costs; the furniture achieved a strong balance between quality and commercial durability.

title_zh: 广州早茶茶餐厅家具定制项目
desc_zh:
本项目为广州市一家早茶茶餐厅的家具定制，面积约260平方米，定位为面向本地家庭与茶客的传统粤式早茶空间。空间以原木色、藤编与复古元素为主，营造亲切、热闹的传统茶楼氛围。

【客户核心需求】家具需适应早茶高翻台、高人流的运营节奏；座椅要耐用、易清洁；圆桌适合多人喝茶聚餐；藤编元素需呼应粤式茶楼文化；整体造价需控制合理。

【我们的解决方案】散座区采用藤编靠背餐椅搭配实木圆桌，适合多人围坐喝茶；卡座区使用软包长椅提升舒适度与坐位密度；过道与翻台区配置轻便餐椅，方便快速调整布局；藤编与原木的搭配呼应传统茶楼气质；所有桌面做防水耐磨处理。

【落地效果】藤编餐椅与实木圆桌营造出浓郁的粤式茶楼氛围；高翻台区的轻便餐椅显著提升了运营效率；卡座区在保证舒适的同时提高了座位密度；防水耐磨桌面降低了早茶高频使用下的清洁压力；整体家具配置兼顾了文化氛围、翻台效率与耐用性。
desc_en:
Furniture customization for a Cantonese morning-tea (yum cha) teahouse in Guangzhou. The 260 sqm space targets local families and tea drinkers for traditional Cantonese morning tea, with natural wood, rattan weave and retro elements creating a warm, lively traditional teahouse atmosphere.

Client needs: furniture must suit the high-turnover, high-traffic pace of morning tea; seating must be durable and easy to clean; round tables must suit group tea gatherings; rattan elements must echo Cantonese teahouse culture; overall cost must be reasonable.

Solution: rattan-back dining chairs with solid-wood round tables for open seating, ideal for groups; upholstered benches in booth areas for comfort and higher seat density; lightweight chairs in aisles and turnover zones for quick layout changes; rattan and natural wood pairing echoing traditional teahouse character; all tabletops treated to be water- and abrasion-resistant.

Result: rattan chairs and solid-wood round tables created a rich Cantonese teahouse atmosphere; lightweight chairs in high-turnover zones significantly improved operational efficiency; booths increased seat density while maintaining comfort; water-resistant tabletops eased cleaning under high-frequency morning-tea use; the furniture balanced cultural atmosphere, turnover efficiency and durability.

title_zh: 悉尼现代餐厅家具项目
desc_zh:
本项目为澳大利亚悉尼一家现代休闲餐厅的家具定制，面积约220平方米，定位为面向本地客群与游客的全日制休闲餐饮空间。空间以浅木色、米白与自然采光为主，营造轻松、明亮、现代的就餐氛围。

【客户核心需求】家具需支持顾客长时间舒适用餐；风格要现代统一；面料须符合澳洲AFRDI商业家具耐用标准；不同区域需要差异化座位组合；材质要环保耐用。

【我们的解决方案】主厅区域采用布艺软包餐椅搭配浅木色餐桌，坐感舒适、风格清爽；靠窗区配置卡座长椅与小桌，适合二人或家庭用餐；吧台区使用浅木色高脚椅，方便单人快餐与等候；所有座椅通过AFRDI耐用测试，桌面做防水耐磨处理。

【落地效果】浅木色与米白软包让空间通透明亮、现代统一；布艺软包餐椅显著提升了顾客的久坐舒适度；靠窗卡座成为二人与家庭用餐的热门区域；通过AFRDI认证的座椅满足了商业高频使用与保险要求；整体家具配置实现了舒适度、现代感与耐用性的平衡。
desc_en:
Furniture customization for a modern casual restaurant in Sydney, Australia. The 220 sqm all-day casual dining space targets local diners and tourists, with light wood, off-white and natural light creating a relaxed, bright and modern atmosphere.

Client needs: furniture must support long, comfortable dining; the style must be modern and unified; fabrics must meet Australian AFRDI commercial furniture durability standards; different zones need varied seating; materials must be eco-friendly and durable.

Solution: fabric upholstered dining chairs with light-wood tables for the main hall, comfortable and fresh; booth benches with small tables in the window zone for couples and families; light-wood bar stools at the counter for solo quick meals and waiting; all seating passed AFRDI durability tests, with water- and abrasion-resistant tabletops.

Result: light wood and off-white upholstery made the space airy, bright and modern; upholstered chairs significantly improved long-stay comfort; window booths became popular for couples and families; AFRDI-certified seating met high-frequency commercial use and insurance requirements; the furniture balanced comfort, modern style and durability.

title_zh: 多伦多西餐厅家具项目
desc_zh:
本项目为加拿大多伦多一家西餐厅的家具定制，面积约250平方米，定位为面向商务与家庭客群的现代欧式正餐空间。空间以深胡桃木色、皮革与暖色灯光为主，营造沉稳、精致的现代欧式就餐氛围。

【客户核心需求】座椅需兼顾正式感与久坐舒适；皮革面料须耐磨并通过加拿大商业家具防火标准；卡座区与散台区需要不同方案；整体风格要沉稳统一。

【我们的解决方案】主厅区域选用高背皮革餐椅，深棕与黑色交替，与木纹桌面形成统一调性；靠墙区采用木框皮革卡座增强围合与私密；吧台区配置皮面高脚椅；所有座椅采用商用级海绵填充，皮革通过耐磨与防火测试。

【落地效果】高背皮革餐椅与深木桌面营造出沉稳精致的欧式氛围；木框皮革卡座为顾客提供了更私密的用餐体验；通过防火与耐磨测试的皮革满足了加拿大商业家具标准；商用级填充保证了长时间使用的舒适与挺括；整体风格沉稳统一，提升了餐厅的品质感。
desc_en:
Furniture customization for a Western restaurant in Toronto, Canada. The 250 sqm space targets business and family diners for modern European-style fine dining, with deep walnut tones, leather and warm lighting creating a composed, refined European atmosphere.

Client needs: seating must balance a formal look with long-stay comfort; leather must be wear-resistant and meet Canadian commercial furniture fire standards; booth and open-seating zones need different solutions; the overall style must be composed and unified.

Solution: high-back leather dining chairs alternating deep brown and black for the main hall, unified with wood-grain tabletops; wood-frame leather booths along the walls for enclosure and privacy; leather bar stools at the counter; all seating with commercial-grade foam, leather passing abrasion and fire tests.

Result: high-back leather chairs and deep-wood tabletops created a composed, refined European atmosphere; wood-frame leather booths offered a more private dining experience; fire- and abrasion-tested leather met Canadian commercial furniture standards; commercial-grade fill ensured long-lasting comfort and firmness; the unified composed style elevated the restaurant's sense of quality.

title_zh: 墨尔本精品餐厅家具项目
desc_zh:
本项目为澳大利亚墨尔本一家精品小酒馆（bistro）的家具定制，面积约150平方米，定位为面向年轻客群的复古工业风休闲餐饮空间。空间以复古皮革、暖木色与工业风金属为主，营造随性、复古而有格调的就餐氛围。

【客户核心需求】小空间需高效利用座位；座椅要复古耐用、坐感舒适；风格要统一有记忆点；面料须好打理；造价需控制合理。

【我们的解决方案】采用复古皮革餐椅搭配小尺寸方桌，提升小空间的座位密度；靠墙区配置皮革卡座长椅，兼顾舒适与空间利用；吧台区设置复古皮面高脚椅，呼应小酒馆氛围；所有皮革面料做防污易护理处理，金属框架做复古做旧处理。

【落地效果】复古皮革餐椅与工业风金属营造出统一而有记忆点的小酒馆氛围；卡座长椅在有限空间内提升了座位密度与舒适度；复古高脚椅强化了吧台社交氛围；易护理皮革降低了日常清洁难度；整体家具配置在小空间内实现了复古格调、座位效率与耐用性的兼顾。
desc_en:
Furniture customization for a boutique bistro in Melbourne, Australia. The 150 sqm space targets young diners with a retro industrial casual style, using vintage leather, warm wood and industrial metal for a relaxed, retro yet stylish dining atmosphere.

Client needs: the small space must use seating efficiently; seating must be retro, durable and comfortable; the style must be unified and memorable; fabrics must be easy to maintain; cost must be reasonable.

Solution: vintage leather dining chairs with small square tables to raise seat density in the compact space; leather bench booths along the walls balancing comfort and space use; vintage leather bar stools at the counter echoing the bistro vibe; all leather treated to be stain-resistant and easy to maintain, with distressed-finish metal frames.

Result: vintage leather chairs and industrial metal created a unified, memorable bistro atmosphere; bench booths raised seat density and comfort in the limited space; vintage bar stools strengthened the counter's social vibe; easy-care leather reduced daily cleaning effort; the furniture balanced retro style, seating efficiency and durability within a small footprint.
